info.title: dcm4chee-arc-light API
info.description: dcm4chee Archive 5 is an IHE-compliant PACS/VNA providing DICOMweb (QIDO-RS, WADO-RS, STOW-RS) and custom REST APIs for managing DICOM studies, series, instances, patients, AE titles, storage, queues, and system configuration.

get.description: QIDO-RS search for studies matching query criteria.

parameters.name: includefield
parameters.description: DICOM tags to include in response

get.description: QIDO-RS search for series within a study.
QIDO-RS search for instances within a series.
Search for series across all studies.

parameters.name: includefield
parameters.description: DICOM tags to include in response

get.description: Search for instances across all studies.

parameters.name: includefield
parameters.description: DICOM tags to include in response

get.description: WADO-RS retrieve all instances of a study.

delete.description: Delete an entire study and all contained objects.

post.description: STOW-RS store DICOM instances into a specific study.

get.description: WADO-RS retrieve metadata for all instances in a study.
WADO-RS retrieve all instances of a series.

delete.description: Delete a series and all contained instances.

get.description: WADO-RS retrieve metadata for all instances in a series.
WADO-RS retrieve a specific instance.
WADO-RS retrieve metadata for a specific instance.
Retrieve a rendered/pixel data representation.
List patients in the archive.

delete.description: Delete a patient and all associated studies.

post.description: Mark a study as rejected with a rejection code.
Export a study to an external destination.

get.description: List all configured Application Entity titles.
Get details of a specific AE title.
List all processing queues.
List messages in a queue.
List all export tasks.
List all retrieve (C-MOVE) tasks.
List configured storage systems and usage.
Returns overall statistics about the archive.
List all configured DICOM devices.
